title: tagetes tanacetifolia
intro: Tagetes tanacetifolia, also known as Mexican Marigold or Tamaulipan Marigold, is an annual plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of limonene and other sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of Tagetes tanacetifolia include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory infections. Tagetes tanacetifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
